Alum Creek Trail, Westerville, OH 43081, USA

Several raspberry and black raspberry bushes along the back part of the trail, along the woods. Much has already been picked over by other foragers and wildlife by this time of year, but a few berries are still peeking out in a few spots. Access: Public.
